user.title: Connect UniFi Protect
user.description: Connect HA Protect Bridge to your UniFi Protect host. After setup, the integration will discover supported camera detections, create managed Protect webhook automations automatically, and expose timestamp sensors in Home Assistant.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure UniFi Protect
reconfigure.description: Update the bridge connection settings. Leave the password empty to keep the current password.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect UniFi Protect
reauth_confirm.description: Update the credentials for {host}. Leave the password empty to keep the current password.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to UniFi Protect.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while setting up the bridge.

abort.already_configured: This UniFi Protect system is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The provided settings point to a different UniFi Protect system.
